modelName: Chef Elite KVC5100S Mary Berry Special Edition
description: The Mary Berry Special Edition of the Kenwood Chef Elite features a bespoke cream finish and exclusive branding not found on standard models. This variant includes a 4.6-litre polished stainless steel bowl and a high-performance 1200W motor designed for consistent results. Unlike the base KVC5100, this edition comes bundled with an exclusive Mary Berry recipe book and a specialised spatula for delicate folding. The package is completed with professional-grade stainless steel bowl tools, including the K-beater, power whisk, and spiral dough hook, ensuring comprehensive versatility for any professional kitchen or serious home bakery.
features: 1200W Planetary Mix Action, Electronic Speed Control with Pulse/Fold, 3 Power Outlets (Slow, High Speed, Bowl), Die-Cast Aluminium Body, 4.6L Stainless Steel Bowl.
uses: Dough kneading, aeration of egg whites, emulsification, batter integration, heavy compound mixing.

accessories.name: 4.6L Stainless Steel Bowl
accessories.description: Polished stainless steel mixing vessel with graduated measurements and handles.

accessories.name: K-Beater
accessories.description: Aluminium signature blade for standard compounding and batter integration.

accessories.name: Power Whisk
accessories.description: Balloon shape wire assembly for high-speed aeration and emulsification.

accessories.name: Dough Hook
accessories.description: Spiral geometry hook for heavy gluten development and kneading.

accessories.name: Splashguard
accessories.description: Two-piece component with feed chute to prevent particulate ejection.

accessories.name: Creaming Beater
accessories.description: Flexible winged beater for scraping bowl sides during creaming process.

accessories.name: Folding Tool
accessories.description: Specialised paddle for gently incorporating heavy ingredients into aerated mixtures.

accessories.name: ThermoResist Glass Blender
accessories.description: High-speed outlet attachment for thermal shock resistant blending.

name: Kenwood Chef Elite KVC5100S Mary Berry Special Edition
